title: The Road to Sabaody: Key Exchange
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Brook, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #2, Brook, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #13, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can't thank you enough, RORONOA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm really sorry for that one time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I hit him!! Did you see that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's a huge guy coming this way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He said something about a medical bill.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: luffy, you go for the fish.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: It'll be like a meteor hit you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who hits hard in the air!!

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #2, Brook, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #13, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.
